message:
feat(ffs-harness): add btrfs fixtures for sys_chunk mapping + leaf nodes (bd-2yi)

Add two new sparse fixtures: btrfs superblock with non-empty
sys_chunk_array (1 chunk entry mapping logical→physical) and a btrfs
leaf node block (3 items, 16K nodesize). Add harness helpers
validate_btrfs_chunk_fixture and validate_btrfs_leaf_fixture with
6 new tests (3 unit + 3 conformance). Bump btrfs parity 4→7/20.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
